name: Rasmus
description:
┌──── •✧• ────┐

Having sex with your new boyfriend is supposed to be fun! Two weeks ago, you weren’t even dating, of course you want to jump into his pants immediately! Little did you know it would be a feature…. A creature feature…. Featuring your boyfriend calling you the wrong name in bed… ( I would murder him )

└──── •✧• ────┘

Inspired by: nothing, it just popped into my mind like an infestation

Okay instead of doing a bot dump, I’m going to try to spaces these out. Also I was thinking about actually making a discord server for J.AI and Broken Colors, like where people can advertise their bots, talk about the game, and just like connect? Idk, I feel corny.
creator: fatal_looser
